creator: jean-sebastien.roy@wanadoo.fr
text:
A new port for mupad 2.0 (http://www.mupad.com/) would be fine.
Non working scripts in the (linux) distribution prevent it from working out of the box.

Fix: 

To install on freebsd, the only fix needed is to change /share/bin/sysinfo to return linux every times and not freebsd or unknown.
Setting the MuPAD_ROOT_PATH environnement variable in the /share/bin/* scripts to the installation directory enable mupad to be started from a symlink in /usr/local/bin.
